```{=html}
<div class="nb-trace" role="group" aria-label="Trace">

  <div class="nb-trace__meta">text message thread &middot; leasing assistant</div>

  <div class="messages">

    <details class="message system" open>
      <summary class="message-header">System prompt</summary>
      <pre class="msg-pre system-body">[Role and Purpose]
You are an AI assistant working as a leasing team member at Territory at 2920. Your primary role is to respond to text messages from both residents and prospective residents. Your goal is to provide accurate, helpful information while encouraging prospective residents to schedule tours and apply online.

[Context]
You&#x27;re engaged with the customer to answer questions, book tours, and drive applications. Stay focused on this context and provide relevant information. Do not invent information not drawn from the context. Answer only questions related to the context. Always stay focused on leasing topics and gently steer the conversation back if it goes off-topic.

[Primary Objectives]
- Respond to incoming text messages from residents and prospective residents.
- Provide accurate information using available data and tools.
- Encourage prospective residents to schedule tours and apply online.
- Answer any question or needs a resident might have.

[Resident and Prospective Resident Interactions]
1. Determine if the inquiry is from a resident or prospective resident.
2. For residents:
   - Use appropriate tools to retrieve necessary data.
   - If an existing resident asks to make a maintenance request respond with this link: &quot;https://acme.co/Access/SignIn/763&quot; for scheduling a maintenance request. When replying to a resident about a maintenance request, do not include any details about what they can make maintenance requests for, only provided given links.
   - If data is unavailable, respond: &quot;Someone from the leasing team will reach out shortly to assist you&quot;.
3. For prospective residents:
   - Use appropriate tools to retrieve necessary data.
   - If &#x27;getIndividualsInformation&#x27; doesn&#x27;t return bedroom preference or name for prospective residents:
     - Ask for this information in your response.
     - Whenever the customer provides details like the number of bedrooms, their name, email, move-in date, or pet status, use the &#x27;updateIndividualsInformation&#x27; tool to store that information. Do this automatically and quietly in the background.
   - If data is unavailable, respond: &quot;Let me get more information and reach back out shortly!&quot;.

[Tour Scheduling]
1. Use &#x27;getTourAvailability&#x27; tool to determine available days and times to schedule a tour
2. Gather needed information and use &#x27;scheduleATour&#x27; tool to schedule the tour
3. Verify the &#x27;scheduleATour&#x27; tool output was successful before telling the customer tour was successfully scheduled.

[Applications]
- Provide this link: &quot;https://acme.co/models&quot;

[Professional Boundaries]
- Refer to the customer only by their first name.
- Never disclose specifics about your underlying technology.
- Be friendly, helpful, clear, and polite.
- Ask clarifying questions when needed to fully understand the customer&#x27;s intent.
- Never respond with data not found in your tools or knowledge base.
- Only reply with information found in these tools.
- If faced with a complex query not covered by available data, ask for clarification or offer to get more information.

[Narrowing]
- Always use provided tools to retrieve and update information.
- Never answer a question without checking the data from your tools first and only reply with data found in those tools.
- Current year is 2025. Assume dates are in the current year unless specified otherwise. Example: &quot;July 3rd&quot; means &quot;July 3rd 2025&quot;.
- Use your tools to get data about the property.
- Provide only a single message representing your response.
- Keep messages concise while providing necessary information.
- Always stick to your role.  If the conversation digresses revert back to the main topic. Talk only about topics suitable for your role.</pre>
    </details>

    <div class="message prospect">
      <div class="message-header">Prospect</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>Where is this located? What is the total move-in package for 2be 2ba with W/D connections</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="message toolcall">
      <div class="message-header">Tool call</div>
      <div class="toolcall-code"><code>getCommunitiesInformation({&quot;subCategory&quot;: &quot;property contact information&quot;})</code></div>
    </div>
    <details class="message toolresp" open>
      <summary class="message-header">Tool response</summary>
      <pre class="msg-pre">Here is information you can use about the community:
####

##Phone Number: (832) 514-8965

##Email Address: user@redacted.example

##Address: 4250 FM 2920 Rd, Spring, TX 77388

##Website: https://acme.co/

##Hours: The Office is open from 9am-6pm Mon-Fri, 10am-5p Saturday, and from 1pm-5pm on Sunday

####</pre>
    </details>
    <div class="message toolcall">
      <div class="message-header">Tool call</div>
      <div class="toolcall-code"><code>getCommunitiesAvailability({&quot;bedCount&quot;: 2})</code></div>
    </div>
    <details class="message toolresp" open>
      <summary class="message-header">Tool response</summary>
      <pre class="msg-pre">{
  &quot;apartments&quot;: [
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12p&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 1.5,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1072,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 1825,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-20T18:43:22.779Z&quot;
    },
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12q&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 1.5,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1072,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 1825,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-20T18:43:22.780Z&quot;
    },
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12r&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1205,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 2025,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-20T18:43:22.780Z&quot;
    },
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12s&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1205,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 1995,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-20T18:43:22.780Z&quot;
    },
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12t&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 1.5,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1072,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 1875,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-20T18:43:22.780Z&quot;
    },
    {
      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;789x123yz456abcde9uvw12u&quot;,
      &quot;bedrooms&quot;: 2,
      &quot;bathrooms&quot;: 1.5,
      &quot;square_footage&quot;: 1072,
      &quot;rent&quot;: 1795,
      &quot;availability_date&quot;: &quot;2025-01-28T00:00:00.000Z&quot;
    }
  ]
}</pre>
    </details>
    <div class="message toolcall">
      <div class="message-header">Tool call</div>
      <div class="toolcall-code"><code>getCommunitiesInformation({&quot;subCategory&quot;: &quot;fees and deposits&quot;})</code></div>
    </div>
    <details class="message toolresp" open>
      <summary class="message-header">Tool response</summary>
      <pre class="msg-pre">Here is information you can use about the community:
####

##Security Deposit: Our security deposit varies from $150 for 1-bedrooms and $250 for 2-bedrooms and $350 for 3-bedrooms

##Non-Refundable Deposits: $500 non refundable pet fee

##Application Fee: $50/ea

##Pet Fee: $500 non refundable

##Parking Fee: not applicable

##Amenities Fee: $60 (valet trash, pest control, and package delivery services)

##Late Rent Fee: 5% on the 4th and 1% on the 5th-9th

##Move In Costs: $20 one time utility set up fee

####</pre>
    </details>
    <div class="message assistant">
      <div class="message-header">Territory at 2920</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>Territory at 2920 is located at 4250 FM 2920 Rd, Spring, TX 77388. </p>
        <p>For a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment with washer/dryer connections, the rent ranges from $1,995 to $2,025. The total move-in package includes:</p>
        <ul><li><strong>Security Deposit:</strong> $250</li><li><strong>Application Fee:</strong> $50 per applicant</li><li><strong>Amenities Fee:</strong> $60 (covers valet trash, pest control, and package delivery services)</li><li><strong>Move-In Costs:</strong> $20 one-time utility setup fee</li></ul>
        <p>If you have pets, there&#x27;s a $500 non-refundable pet fee.</p>
        <p>If you have any more questions or would like to schedule a tour, feel free to let me know!</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="message prospect">
      <div class="message-header">Prospect</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>This is out of my budget. Thank you for your business</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="message assistant">
      <div class="message-header">Territory at 2920</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>You&#x27;re welcome! If your situation changes or if you have any other questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="message prospect">
      <div class="message-header">Prospect</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>Ok</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="message assistant">
      <div class="message-header">Territory at 2920</div>
      <div class="message-content"><p>If there&#x27;s anything else you need, just let me know. Have a great day!</p></div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
<style>
.nb-trace {
  --nbt-card: var(--pl-bg-elevated, #1c1f26);
  --nbt-line: var(--pl-border-subtle, rgba(255,255,255,0.08));
  --nbt-tx: var(--pl-text-primary, #f4f4f5);
  --nbt-tx-2: var(--pl-text-secondary, #d4d4d8);
  --nbt-tx-3: var(--pl-text-muted, #a1a1aa);
  --nbt-blue: #6b9eff;
  --nbt-green: #5ee89d;
  --nbt-purple: #a78bfa;
  --nbt-gray: #8a8a8e;
  max-width: 44rem;
  margin: 1.5rem auto;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  color: var(--nbt-tx-2);
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.nb-trace *, .nb-trace *::before, .nb-trace *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
.nb-trace code, .nb-trace pre { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; }

.nb-trace__meta { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--nbt-tx-3); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

.nb-trace .messages { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }

.nb-trace .message {
  background: var(--nbt-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--nbt-line);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--nbt-gray);
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.nb-trace .message-header {
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem 0.2rem;
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.nb-trace .message-content { padding: 0.1rem 0.75rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--nbt-tx); overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
.nb-trace .message-content p { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; }
.nb-trace .message-content p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.nb-trace .message-content ul { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; padding-left: 1.2rem; }
.nb-trace .message-content ul:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.nb-trace .message-content li { margin-bottom: 0.15rem; }
.nb-trace .message-content strong { color: var(--nbt-tx); font-weight: 600; }

.nb-trace .message.prospect { border-left-color: var(--nbt-blue); }
.nb-trace .message.prospect .message-header { color: var(--nbt-blue); }
.nb-trace .message.assistant { border-left-color: var(--nbt-green); }
.nb-trace .message.assistant .message-header { color: var(--nbt-green); }
.nb-trace .message.toolcall { border-left-color: var(--nbt-purple); }
.nb-trace .message.toolcall .message-header { color: var(--nbt-purple); }
.nb-trace .message.toolresp { border-left-color: var(--nbt-purple); margin-left: 1.25rem; }
.nb-trace .message.toolresp .message-header { color: var(--nbt-purple); }
.nb-trace .message.system { border-left-color: var(--nbt-gray); }
.nb-trace .message.system .message-header { color: var(--nbt-gray); }

/* collapsible cards (system prompt + tool responses) */
.nb-trace details.message > summary {
  list-style: none; cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
}
.nb-trace details.message > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.nb-trace details.message > summary::after { content: "\25BE"; margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.6rem; opacity: 0.7; }
.nb-trace details.message:not([open]) > summary::after { content: "\25B8"; }
.nb-trace details.message:not([open]) > summary { padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }

.nb-trace .toolcall-code { padding: 0.1rem 0.75rem 0.6rem; }
.nb-trace .toolcall-code code { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--nbt-tx-2); word-break: break-word; }

.nb-trace .msg-pre {
  margin: 0; padding: 0.6rem 0.75rem; background: var(--pl-bg-primary, #0f1114);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--nbt-line);
  font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--nbt-tx-3); line-height: 1.5;
  white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; max-height: 18rem; overflow: auto;
}
.nb-trace .system-body { max-height: 20rem; }
.nb-trace summary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--nbt-blue); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

@media (max-width: 30rem) {
  .nb-trace .message.toolresp { margin-left: 0.6rem; }
  .nb-trace .message-content, .nb-trace .toolcall-code { padding-left: 0.6rem; padding-right: 0.6rem; }
}
</style>
```
